news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: DeFiLlama数据显示，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新晋去中心化交易所交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total DeFi TVL increased 12% this week, driven by rising trading volume on new DEXs, according to DeFiLlama.

news.title_en: Cardano Unveils Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计Q3上线主网，将增强智能合约能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet in Q3. It promises stronger smart contract capabilities and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展多链生态。
news.summary_en: Chainlink CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding its cross-chain interoperability capabilities for broader multi-chain adoption.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币拟引入ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Core Proposes ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: 狗狗币核心开发者提议采用ZK-Rollup Layer2方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费，草案已由基金会研究小组发布。
news.summary_en: Dogecoin core developers propose a ZK-Rollup Layer2 solution to reduce micro-transaction fees, as outlined in a draft from the foundation’s research group.
